mapper.insert: insert into platform_coupon_usage_log (store_coupon_id, template_id, market_id, store_gb_department_id, verify_type, checkout_token, payment_id, bill_id, discount_amount, before_status, after_status, operator_type, operator_id) values (#{storeCouponId}, #{templateId}, #{marketId}, #{storeGbDepartmentId}, #{verifyType}, #{checkoutToken}, #{paymentId}, #{billId}, #{discountAmount}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId})
